highlights.description: Vendor-neutral memory abstraction layer for Go with multi-provider support
Semantic search via vector embeddings with pluggable embedders
Built-in multi-tenancy with strict tenant and subject isolation

added.description: Core `Provider` interface with CRUD and semantic operations (Add, Get, Update, Delete, List, Search, Recall)
Memory types: observation, fact, preference, summary, trait, relationship
Memory scopes: user, agent, tenant, team, session, domain
Multi-provider client with automatic fallback support
Embedder interface with OmniLLM integration for semantic search
Context-based isolation with TenantID, SubjectID, SessionID fields
Conformance test suite (`core/providertest`) for validating provider implementations
Ent ORM schema for PostgreSQL with pgvector embedding column
HNSW indexing for efficient vector similarity search
In-memory provider for testing and development
PostgreSQL provider with native pgvector similarity search
Provider stubs for Mem0, Graphiti, and Twilio
Package entry point with re-exports and convenience constructors

fixed.description: Context parameter usage in client fallback method
Subject isolation enforcement in memory provider

tests.description: Unit tests for core types, embedder, and registry
Conformance tests for in-memory and KVS providers

documentation.description: MkDocs documentation site with PlexusOne theme
Getting started guides: installation, quickstart, configuration
Provider documentation: memory, postgres, kvs, twilio
Feature guides: semantic search, multi-tenancy, embeddings, fallback
README with badges, quick start, and provider overview

build.description: GitHub Actions workflows for CI, lint, and security scanning
